description: Renovate config for this template. Extends the recommended preset; see https://docs.renovatebot.com/configuration-options/ for tuning options (auto-merge policies, schedules, grouping rules).

packageRules.description: Major bumps land on the Dependency Dashboard as a checkbox instead of opening a PR automatically. Tick the box, run Renovate, and it opens the PR — keeps the review queue free of breaking-change PRs you didn't ask for.
